info.title: EVA Model API
info.description:
Machine-queryable HTTP interface to the EVA semantic object model. Every layer. Every object. Audit trail on every write.

**Mode**: `COSMOS_URL` set → Cosmos DB.  Unset → in-memory (ephemeral).

**Admin token**: `Authorization: Bearer <ADMIN_TOKEN>` for /model/admin/* routes.

schema.title: Response Upsert Object Model Services  Obj Id  Put
Response Delete Object Model Services  Obj Id  Delete

200.description: Endpoints, screens, agents, requirements referencing the target container

schema.title: Response Impact Analysis Model Impact  Get

post.summary: Seed store from disk JSON layer files (idempotent — safe to re-run)
post.description:
Reads each model/<layer>.json file and upserts every object into the store.
Preserves existing created_by / created_at on objects that already exist.
Increments row_version on existing objects.
Idempotent: safe to call on first run, re-runs, and migrations.

schema.title: Response Seed Model Admin Seed Post

post.summary: Export store back to disk JSON layer files (completes the write cycle)
post.description:
Step 3 of the correct write cycle:
  1. PUT /model/{layer}/{id}     -- stamps modified_at / modified_by / row_version
  2. GET /model/{layer}/{id}     -- verify
  3. POST /model/admin/export    -- this endpoint: write store back to model/*.json
  4. assemble-model.ps1          -- rebuild eva-model.json

Each layer file is written as {"$schema": <existing>, "<layer>": [...]}
Internal store fields (obj_id, layer) are stripped; all audit fields are preserved.
Cosmos document-id (base64 encoded) is replaced with the business obj_id.

schema.title: Response Export To Disk Model Admin Export Post
Response Flush Cache Model Admin Cache Flush Post

post.summary: One-shot: stamp missing audit fields on all legacy objects. Derives source_file from layer-specific path fields where possible. Idempotent — safe to re-run; only touches objects that are still missing fields.
post.description:
Walks every object in every layer.  For each object that is missing any
of {created_by, created_at, modified_by, modified_at, row_version, is_active}:

  1. Derives source_file from a layer-specific hint field if that field
     is present (e.g. endpoints.implemented_in → source_file)
  2. Calls store.upsert() so the write cycle stamps modified_* and
     increments row_version correctly
  3. Flushes the layer cache

After a full backfill, run POST /model/admin/export + assemble-model.ps1
to persist the corrected audit trail back to disk.

schema.title: Response Backfill Metadata Model Admin Backfill Post

get.summary: Last N write events across all layers — audit trail

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Number of events to return
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Number of events to return

schema.title: Response Audit Log Model Admin Audit Get

get.summary: Run cross-reference integrity check in-process — equivalent to validate-model.ps1
get.description:
Checks:
1. endpoint.cosmos_reads/writes → containers
2. endpoint.feature_flag        → feature_flags
3. endpoint.auth[]              → personas
4. screen.api_calls[]           → endpoints
5. literal.screens[]            → screens
6. requirement.satisfied_by[]   → endpoints + screens
7. agent.output_screens[]       → screens

schema.title: Response Validate Model Admin Validate Get

post.summary: One-call write cycle shortcut: export to disk + assemble eva-model.json + validate. Returns {status, violations, counts, exported, assemble, validate}. Replaces steps 3-5 of the manual write cycle.
post.description:
Shortcut for the final three steps of the write cycle:
  Step 3: POST /model/admin/export    (done inline)
  Step 4: assemble-model.ps1          (run via subprocess)
  Step 5: validate cross-references   (done inline, same logic as GET /model/admin/validate)

Response shape:
{
  "status":    "PASS" | "FAIL",
  "violations": [...],            # empty on PASS
  "violation_count": 0,
  "exported":  { "projects": 45, ... },
  "exported_total": 865,
  "assemble":  { "ok": true, "rc": 0, "stdout": "..." },
  "actor": "..."
}

schema.title: Response Commit Model Admin Commit Post

get.summary: Liveness check
All layer counts in one call — use this instead of querying each layer separately
get.description:
Returns item count for every layer + total.  No auth required.
One call replaces 27 separate GET /model/{layer}/ count queries.
Response includes store type and cache_ttl so agents know the write-safety profile.

schema.title: Response Agent Summary Model Agent Summary Get
